style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift lazily upward like powdered stardust, dissolving into soft petal-shaped aura particles that pulse with a delicate pink and lavender glow. A warm, ethereal aura encircles the body in a loose, flowing halo of pastel light, refracting faint musical note vibrations that shimmer in soft amber and mint hues. The lighting mood is serene and dreamlike, with a gentle glow emanating from within, casting a soft, diffused radiance that highlights the delicate wings and body contours. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
